subcodes.first_line: O Ism-i-Há! The Lord of Names proclaims: In this Day, the cause of victory and the source of the exaltation of the Cause is the unity of God's loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسم ها مالک اسما میفرماید امروز سبب نصرت و علت ارتفاع امر اتحاد احبای الهی
subcodes.subjects: @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
